seoTitle: Cairns Bay vs Calder — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cairns Bay and Calder. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cairns Bay vs Calder: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cairns Bay and Calder.
heading: Cairns Bay vs Calder — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cairns Bay, Tasmania and Calder, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cairns Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Calder (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cairns Bay or Calder safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cairns Bay has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Calder scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cairns Bay scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Calder scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cairns Bay or Calder?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cairns Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
